text_excerpt: --> All news | Ruth Cadbury MP | Labour MP | Brentford and Isleworth top of page About All news Advice More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. All Posts Newsletter News Westminster Insight Day I am running a Westminster Insight Day to bring local young people to Parliament to learn more about our politics and democracy. I previously ran one over the February half term and received overwhelmingly positive feedback - 100% of attendees said that they would recommend the Insight Day to a friend. The day will give young people an opportunity to learn about Parliament as well as contribute to my work as an MP and gain first-hand experience of Westminster politics. Please Apr 21 1 min read Ruth calls for a ban on goods entering the UK from illegal Israeli Settlements Apr 21 0 min read Ruth speaks out about the infected blood scandal Apr 14 0 min read Ruth welcomes new £30 million funding for youth services Young people in the Boroughs of Hounslow and Richmond are set to benefit from a major new £30 million investment in youth services, as the Mayor of London, Sadiq Khan, launches the landmark ‘Youth Lates’ programme to bring high-quality youth clubs back into every community.
